steps.title: Read the causal effect
steps.content: Knowing that the Santiago Stock Exchange provides regulatory oversight should reduce investors' worries about bureaucratic details. The phrase "thereby allow them" shows that the blank must name an action that eases those worries so investors can focus on opportunities.

steps.title: Test the word meanings
steps.content: Choice A means to officially label, which does not fit worries. Choice B means to increase, the opposite of the needed meaning. Choice D means to communicate, not to ease. The remaining word means to calm or relieve concerns. The answer is C.
